roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGEVIOLATION #2 - DISTURBING THE PEACE, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #2 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:70 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:COURT IMPOSES ANO CONTACT ORDER FROM CIELO GARCIA,VIOLATION # 1 - BATTERY SPOUSE-CHILD ISDISMISSEDCLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BEAVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, APRIL 3, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO ADETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 65 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENTFAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 65 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY ON THIS PETITION TO SERVEHIS JAILSENTENCE,  IN ADDITION, CLIENT MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPONA VIOLATION OF A COURT ORDER,/X:PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 03-12-14,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
